description_long: This is a Viking-style helmet featuring a dark metallic dome adorned with two prominent, curved horns extending from either side. The helmet's surface is reinforced with vertical and horizontal metal bands, each studded with evenly spaced rivets for added strength and visual detail. The horns are a pale, bone-like color, contrasting sharply with the dark, slightly weathered metal of the helmet. At the apex of the dome sits a small, pointed finial, adding to the helmet's historical and decorative appeal. The rim of the helmet is encircled by a thick metal band, also studded with rivets, providing additional structural integrity. The overall design is robust and intimidating, evoking imagery of Norse warriors and medieval combat.
description: A dark metal Viking helmet with two large, curved bone-colored horns and studded metal bands, featuring a pointed finial on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horns symmetrically, the central vertical metal band, and the pointed finial clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the curvature and attachment of the right horn, with the helmet's dome and riveted band visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both horns from behind, the central vertical band, and the finial at the top.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the left horn's attachment and the helmet's rounded back, with rivet details along the rim.
